name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for GeoRacing
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

## Component

Which part of the platform does this affect?

- [ ] Android app
- [ ] iOS app
- [ ] Web panel
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Beacons
- [ ] Discord bot
- [ ] Docs / other

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or the gap this feature would
address. What can't you do today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or any other context.
